title: lycopodiella × copelandii
intro: Lycopodiella × copelandii, also known as the Copeland's forked spike moss, is a rare and unique hybrid plant that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. It is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lycopodiella × copelandii include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote lung function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
